text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's late afternoon, and Air Shakur hasn't turned
up for training yet. I'm starting to wonder what
happened, when...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Heeey, are you serious? I came to check just in
case, but I didn't think you'd actually still be here.
choice_data_list:
I'm glad to see you're okay. I thought something
might have happened to you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Most people would be angry right about
now.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I just got a bit carried away coding. Next thing I
knew, it was late.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If I get some time, I'll try embedding a timer in my
code editor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur appears remorseful in her own way, so
I decide to overlook today's incident.
